text.tspan: CORS, sandboxed iframes, OS process sandbox,
• No access to your local filesystem
• No access to your local credentials/keys
• Easy to revoke (close tab, end session)
• User can WATCH the agent work
• If logged into apps, Leg 1 still present
• Agent can take actions in those apps
Agent runs in a browser tab
It can ONLY do what a browser
tab can do: navigate URLs, click,
